_comment: Project-level HIPAA-Guard configuration. Commit this file to your repo.

llm._baa_note: Set has_hipaa_baa to true only if your Anthropic account has a signed BAA. If false, the system will use local LLM (Ollama) for all analysis to keep PHI on-premise.

scan._onboarding_note: When true, first run is survey-only (no blocking). Set to false after initial triage.

_custom_phi_note: Add project-specific PHI identifier patterns here as regex strings.
